_readme: Copy this file to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Mac) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). Replace /absolute/path/to with the actual path to this repo on your machine. Configure both servers to test Claude Desktop orchestration — that is the point of the Phase 0 spike.

monitor-agent._readme: Detects anomalies in the sample dataset. Part of the Phase 0 coordination spike.

engineer-agent._readme: Investigates anomalies detected by monitor-agent. Configure alongside monitor-agent to test Claude Desktop coordination.
